meta.name: Saketh Metta
meta.title: CS Researcher & Systems Engineer
meta.desc: MS Computer Science student at Oregon State University. I modify PostgreSQL internals, run a two-node k3s homelab, and build automation that actually ships.

about.ta:
CS 325 — Analysis of Algorithms
CS 440 — Database Management
about.targets: AI/ML Eng · Systems Eng · Data Eng · Research SWE
about.interests: ML Systems · Robotics · Distributed Infra · Photography

projects.title: TA Grading Automation
projects.body: Python pipeline that walks student submission directories, unzips archives, compiles C++ with g++, executes binaries, validates output CSV ordering, and writes a summary CSV — eliminating hours of manual grading per assignment across CS 325 and CS 440.

projects.title: Adapter Composition at Sub-1B Scale
projects.body: Exploring adapter merging strategies — task arithmetic, TIES, DARE+TIES, LoraHub, MoE inference — on from-scratch trained models under 1B parameters. Targeting a real literature gap: systematic comparison at sub-1B scale with controlled training. GTX 1060 + RTX 4070 hardware.

projects.title: Job Search Tooling
projects.body: Config-driven Python scraper targeting AI/ML, Robotics, and Embedded roles. Proxy-aware, filter-based, designed to surface high-signal postings and cut noise from the standard job board firehose.

projects.title: ROS2 Navigation Stack
projects.body: Working with ROS2 Jazzy on TurtleBot3 simulation and the Nav2 navigation stack in Gazebo. Parallel interest in ESP32/BLE room detection and embedded IoT integration.

projects.title: Jarvis-style Personal Assistant
projects.body: Long-horizon project: building a local, voice-driven personal assistant system with hands-free task automation, web search, data retrieval, and media playback. Combines LLM inference, speech recognition, and system integration.

projects.title: sakethmetta.org
projects.body: This portfolio. Built on Cloudflare Pages with a Node.js/Express backend. Custom domain, GitHub-integrated deployment.

software.summary: First professional team environment working alongside software engineers on real enterprise Salesforce infrastructure supporting university academic operations.

contributions.title: Automated Curriculum Change
contributions.body: Integrated DocuSign PDFs with Salesforce Flows to simplify curriculum modifications, boosting record accuracy and efficiency.

contributions.title: Reporting
contributions.body: Set up custom permissions in Salesforce for faculty committee assignments and exam scheduling, improving resource management.

contributions.title: Course Validation
contributions.body: Implemented warnings and alerts in the POS to prevent zero-credit and duplicate courses, ensuring accurate fulfillment and tracking.

contributions.title: Grade Requirement Enforcement
contributions.body: Customized workflows to enforce departmental grade policies and streamline approvals.

contributions.title: Platform Expertise
contributions.body: Developed complex Apex classes, custom permissions, and Lightning Web Components, collaborating with cross-functional teams on high-impact projects.

unrelated.body: Managed and trained a team of 20, achieving recognition as the best advisor for over 24 months. Enhanced Spotify's content management by facilitating music uploads and profile updates for artists. Acted as a backup Real-Time Analyst, ensuring adherence to service level targets and optimizing workflow processes. Implemented a direct feature request service on Spotify, enabling artists to seamlessly submit features, significantly boosting user engagement.

Resolved hardware and software issues for Amazon Echo and Kindle devices, providing expert troubleshooting. Conducted comprehensive training for multiple advisors on technical support processes. Developed rapid problem analysis skills to swiftly identify and resolve issues, maintaining a consistent record as a top performer by meeting and exceeding performance metrics throughout tenure.
